description: Machine-readable task-contract shape enforced by scripts/ai-ops/validate-task-contract.mjs. Contracts declare scope and authorizations as data only; they never carry executable shell commands and can never authorize force-push, history rewrite, secret disclosure, automatic production deployment, or a bypass of owner authorization.

types.exactPaths: string[] (repository-relative POSIX; no absolute, no traversal)

rules: no duplicate entries within a list
no path both authorized (exact/prefix) and forbidden
each field must be an explicit boolean
merge=true is honored only with an explicit owner decision recorded outside the contract
deploy=true additionally requires an owner-approved master SHA
no authorization may be inferred from another
allowedCategories and prohibitedCategories must be disjoint
prohibitedCategories must include every category listed in CBW_CONTROLLED_REPAIR_POLICY_v1

prohibitedAuthorizations.description: Values a task contract may never contain anywhere (any field, including forbiddenActions must list them as forbidden, never as allowed).
hardFail: any embedded shell command field (command, cmd, run, exec, shell, script)
ownerAuthorizations.deploy true without an ownerApprovedDeploySha field
a contract requesting a wholesale main<->master merge

safety.noExecutableCommands: the contract carries data only; validators never execute contract-provided commands
safety.noSecrets: the contract must not contain passwords, private keys, tokens or session cookies
